sys_app.name: Employee Onboarding and Offboarding
sys_app.short_description: Automated solution for employee onboarding and offboarding lifecycle management in ServiceNow.
sys_app.description:
A comprehensive ServiceNow application that automates the complete employee lifecycle management process. This scoped application contains all components including: - Custom Employee Lifecycle table and data model - Service Catalog item with dynamic form variables - UI Policies for conditional field visibility - Business Rules for data validation and status automation - Flow Designer workflow with manager approval and department task assignment - Role-Based Access Control with granular ACLs - Email notifications for all workflow events - SLA definitions for process compliance tracking
Built for SKILLWALLET INTERNSHIP by Mahammad Abubakar Siddiq.
